allow: Bash(mkdir -p docs app scripts && echo "dirs created")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlalchemy, alembic, dotenv; print\('sqlalchemy', sqlalchemy.__version__\); print\('alembic', alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt -q --trusted-host pypi.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org --trusted-host pypi.python.org)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlalchemy, alembic, dotenv; print\('SQLAlchemy', sqlalchemy.__version__\); print\('Alembic', alembic.__version__\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from app import models; from app.db import Base; print\('tables:', len\(Base.metadata.tables\)\); [print\(' -', t\) for t in sorted\(Base.metadata.tables\)]")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect\('app.db'\); n=[r[0] for r in c.execute\(\\"select name from sqlite_master where type='table' and name!='alembic_version'\\"\)]; print\(len\(n\),'domain tables'\)")
